# terrible_f5networks_f5_modules_bigip_asm_dos_application (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `profile` (String) Specifies the name of the profile to manage application settings in.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `geolocations` (String) Manages the geolocations countries whitelist, blacklist.
- `heavy_urls` (String) Manages Heavy URL protection. Heavy URLs are a small number of site URLs that might consume considerable server resources per request.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `mobile_detection` (String) Configures detection of mobile applications built with the Anti-Bot Mobile SDK and defines how requests from these mobile application clients are handled.
- `partition` (String) Device partition to manage resources on.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `rtbh_duration` (Number) Specifies the duration of the RTBH BGP route advertisement, in seconds. The acceptable range is between 0 and 4294967295 inclusive.
- `rtbh_enable` (Boolean) Specifies whether to enable Remote Triggered Black Hole `RTBH` of attacking IPs by advertising BGP routes.
- `scrubbing_duration` (Number) Specifies the duration of the Traffic Scrubbing BGP route advertisement, in seconds. The acceptable range is between 0 and 4294967295 inclusive.
- `scrubbing_enable` (Boolean) Specifies whether to enable Traffic Scrubbing during attacks by advertising BGP routes.
- `single_page_application` (Boolean) When `true`, specifies the system supports a Single Page Applications.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) When `state` is `present`, ensures that the Application object exists. When `state` is `absent`, ensures that the Application object is removed.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `trigger_irule` (Boolean) When `true`, specifies the system activates an Application DoS iRule event.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
